---
title: "Quarto Pratica"
execute:
  eval: true
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{python}
#| echo: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def make_plot(style):
    plt.style.use(style)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.plot([1, 2, 3], [1, 4, 9])
    plt.show()
```

::: {.light-plot}
```{python}
#| echo: false
make_plot('default')
```
:::

::: {.dark-plot}
```{python}
#| echo: false
make_plot('dark_background')
```
:::

```{python}
#| eval: false
print("Hello, World!")
```
::: {.cell-output}
Hello, World!
:::
